response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems beyond a brief role at National Instruments, and shows no evidence of expertise in message brokers, IEC 62443, multi-threaded networking, or IoT protocols critical to the role. His recent work is overwhelmingly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no mention of STL, secure development lifecycle, or cloud platforms like Azure.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions and technical documentation skills
Strong background in distributed systems and event-driven architectures (DLang, Node.js)
Proven ability to mentor and lead workshops on testing and software practices
concerns: Minimal recent C++ experience; no evidence of STL, OOP, or high-performance C++ development
No exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or IoT protocols (MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus)
Lacks cloud platform experience (Azure) and no demonstrated work on on-premises industrial automation systems
